headline: Will Huntington’s New In‑House REIT and Utilities Research Platform Reshape HBAN’s Capital Markets Narrative?
summary: Earlier in July 2026, Huntington Bancshares’ subsidiary Huntington Securities launched an equity research platform for Huntington Capital Markets clients, initially covering Real Estate Investment Trusts and Utilities with two senior analysts hired to lead the effort. This move adds an in-house research capability to Huntington’s capital markets offering, potentially deepening institutional client relationships and broadening fee-based services. We’ll now examine how adding an internal REIT...
